hero.name: Hiram Acevedo
hero.subtitle: Fullstack Developer · AI & LLM Integration
hero.tagline: Building end-to-end solutions from medical systems to AI-powered language tools. 21+ shipped projects.

about.title: About
about.p1: Fullstack Web Developer with 21+ shipped projects, from production medical systems to AI-powered language learning tools. I build end-to-end solutions with Next.js, Python/FastAPI, Java/Spring Boot, and run local LLM inference pipelines on Apple Silicon.
about.p2: Currently finishing my CS degree at Universidad de Guadalajara (GPA 95.64/100) and completing Oracle Academy + TCS Empowers programs.

bullets: Personal R&D lab exploring local AI, modular architecture, and open-source tooling
Built HanziFlow: 6-tool Mandarin learning ecosystem with local LLM inference on Apple Silicon
Architected dual-site brand infrastructure (hiram.work + hiramlab.center) with Next.js 16 and i18n
Production system serving 200+ patients with appointment scheduling and clinical records
Reduced scheduling time by 80% through automated workflows and calendar integration
Full-stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL, Tailwind CSS
Delivered 21+ projects: SaaS platforms, REST APIs, e-commerce, event management, and AI tools
Tech range: Java/Spring Boot, Python/FastAPI, React, Angular, Laravel, MySQL, MongoDB
Clients include Supplie.me (role-based e-commerce SaaS) and EventManager (event tracking platform)
